query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consultations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  patientName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  patientEmail VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  patientPhone VARCHAR(50),
  symptoms TEXT NOT NULL,
  medicalHistory TEXT,
  medicalReports TEXT,
  labResults TEXT,
  xrayImages TEXT,
  otherDocuments TEXT,
  preferredLanguage ENUM('en', 'ar') DEFAULT 'en' NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('submitted', 'ai_processing', 'specialist_review', 'completed', 'follow_up') DEFAULT 'submitted' NOT NULL,
  aiAnalysis TEXT,
  aiReportUrl VARCHAR(500),
  aiVideoUrl VARCHAR(500),
  aiInfographicUrl VARCHAR(500),
  specialistNotes TEXT,
  reviewedBy INT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  treatmentPlan TEXT,
  followUpNotes TEXT,
  followUpStatus ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'concerns'),
  isFree BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  amount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  paymentStatus ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'failed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  paymentId VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  paymentId VARCHAR(255),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
